snippets.comment: Professor Quan is the best! She's really sweet and is very helpful. She does tons of examples, so you shouldn't have any problems understanding the material. She lets you use notes on tests too, which is also great. If you struggle with math, she's very patient and really goes the extra mile to help

I cant say enough about Dr. Quan. She is the best math teacher i've ever had. She is really good at explaining things and never makes you feel had about asking questions. She wants you to do  your best and will do what she can to get you there. If you have trouble with math, Dr. Quan is the professo

Dr. Quan is an awesome professor! She is patient, approachable, uber sweet, and really cares about her students. Need help? Email her and she responds incredibly quickly.
